description: Beta patch: move Claude shared subagent worktrees under `.trellis/trellis-worktrees`, auto-strip conflicting host worktree isolation, and sync the update/review contract around that path.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- fix(claude): shared Claude subagent worktrees now live under `.trellis/trellis-worktrees/<task-dir-name>`, avoiding the `.claude/**` sensitive-path barrier during `acceptEdits` writes.
- fix(hooks): the shared subagent hook now strips conflicting Claude `isolation: "worktree"` only when the task strategy or structured path fields prove the session is using the Trellis shared worktree contract, avoiding prompt-text false positives.
- fix(update): generated workflow docs, Claude agent prompts, `.trellis/.gitignore`, safe-commit guards, and update-path tests now agree on the new shared worktree location and review-gate coverage.

**Notes:**
- Existing projects should run `trellis update` so generated hooks, workflow text, and hygiene guards all move to the new shared worktree path together.
notes: Run `trellis update` after installing this version to move generated Claude shared-worktree hooks and templates onto `.trellis/trellis-worktrees/<task-dir-name>`. No manual file migration is required unless you have locally modified generated templates.
